title: AI Agent node string length error
symptom: The AI Agent node throws an error indicating that a string exceeds the maximum length of 64 characters. This prevents the workflow from executing properly.
applies_when: Sending messages with names longer than 64 characters
not_this_if: Messages are within the character limit
Using only text messages without exceeding limits
root_cause: The error occurs because the AI Agent node expects a specific JSON structure for messages. When handling image messages, the structure may inadvertently include keys or values that exceed the 64-character limit, leading to a bad request error.
fix_steps: Update the workflow to separate logic for text and image messages using an IF node
Ensure that image messages are sent as strings and not as objects
Clear any stored objects that may contain invalid URLs from the database
agent_instruction: Modify the workflow to handle text and image messages correctly and clear any invalid stored objects.
